title: Implement secretx-alibaba-sm backend
description: Implement the Alibaba Cloud KMS Secrets Manager backend. Stub README exists at secretx-alibaba-sm/README.md. URI: secretx:alibaba-sm:<region>/<secret-name>. Auth via ALIBABA_CLOUD_ACCESS_KEY_ID + ALIBABA_CLOUD_ACCESS_KEY_SECRET (RAM role credentials as fallback). API endpoint: kms.<region>.aliyuncs.com. Implements SecretStore and WritableSecretStore. OSCCA SM4 encryption note documented in stub. No FIPS path.
